title: Essentia Live
description: Real-time audio analysis of YouTube videos using Essentia.js (MTG Barcelona) — mel spectrogram, chroma/HPCP, key detection, MFCC, and spectral features via WebAssembly in the browser.
license_notes: Essentia.js 0.1.3 (AGPL-3.0) — WASM port of Essentia C++ library by MTG Barcelona.
